fileDownloadFailed: Failed to download the requested file.
verificationAssetUnavailable: Unable to retrieve the verification document.
file_not_found: The requested file could not be found.
file_retrieval_failed: Failed to retrieve the requested file.
stream_failed: Failed to read the file stream.
verification_failed: Unable to process identity verification at this time.

face_not_detected: No face was detected in the uploaded image.
face_match_failed: The uploaded selfie does not match the identity document.

already_verified: Your identity has already been verified.
invalid_upload_reference: The uploaded verification files could not be found. Please upload your documents again.

invalid_status_transition: This KYC verification cannot be approved from its current status.
verification_pending: Your identity verification has been submitted and is under review.
